extortion.description: [AI generated] MIE Industrial Sdn Bhd is a Malaysia-based company specializing in manufacturing and trading quality electrical components. It offers a range of products including limit switches, push buttons, box enclosures, tower lights, and more. MIE prioritizes safety and reliability in their electrical components and caters to the needs of various industrial sectors. Their aim is to provide efficient solutions to their clients and contribute to the steady growth of the industrial sector.
